summary: GDPR data export, Admin audit log, and Book creation bug fix testing completed. All 13 backend tests passed (100%). All 11 features verified working correctly.

issues: Cookie consent banner can overlap with Next/Create buttons - need to dismiss it before form interaction

passed_tests: GET /api/account/export-data returns 200 with valid JSON when authenticated
GET /api/account/export-data has Content-Disposition header for file download
GET /api/account/export-data response structure contains personal_information, subscription, books, total_books, export_date
GET /api/admin/audit-log returns paginated structure (logs, total, page, total_pages)
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/promote creates audit entry with action='promotion'
POST /api/admin/users/{id}/demote creates audit entry with action='révocation'
DELETE /api/admin/users/{id} creates audit entry with action='suppression'
POST /api/books with auth token creates book successfully (bug fix verified)
POST /api/books returns book with user_id associated
UI: Account page has 'Mes données personnelles' GDPR export section with data-testid='gdpr-export-card'
UI: Account page has 'Exporter mes données' button with data-testid='btn-export-data'
UI: Admin dashboard has 'Journal d'activité' audit log section with data-testid='audit-log-card'
UI: Admin dashboard displays audit log entries with action badges (promotion/révocation/suppression)
UI: Book creation via 'Nouveau livre' button successfully creates book and navigates to book detail page
seed_data_creation: Created test users with 'TEST_audit_' prefix during backend testing, cleaned up after tests. Created one test book during UI testing, also cleaned up.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 10 testing complete. Features verified: 1) GDPR data export (GET /api/account/export-data) - returns JSON with personal_info, subscription, books array, has Content-Disposition header. 2) Admin audit log (GET /api/admin/audit-log) - paginated logs, entries created for promote/demote/delete actions with action field values 'promotion', 'révocation', 'suppression'. 3) Book creation bug fix - POST /api/books now receives Authorization header correctly from CreateBook.jsx. Frontend data-testids: gdpr-export-card, btn-export-data, audit-log-card, audit-log-list, audit-entry-{n}. Note: Cookie consent banner can block form interactions - use force=True for clicks.

gdpr_export.response_format: JSON with personal_information, subscription, books array, total_books

admin_audit_log.ui_location: Admin dashboard - 'Journal d'activité' section (scroll to bottom)

book_creation_bugfix.issue: CreateBook.jsx was not sending Authorization header
book_creation_bugfix.fix_verified: Book creation via UI successfully creates book and navigates to /book/{id}
book_creation_bugfix.createbook_jsx_fix: Added Authorization header to axios POST request
